name: address
label: Agent IPv6 address
help: The IPv6 /128 address whose inbound lookups to read, e.g. 2a04:2a01:b69a:6717:e3b0:51ff:3bf7:f478.

name: kind
label: Lookup source filter
help: Narrow the feed by source. Omit for all sources.

name: limit
label: Maximum rows
help: Maximum number of lookup rows to return (server default 1000, capped at 10000).
